purpose: Local truth source for the first World Intent Engine slice. DeepSeek may propose wording, but this file and local engine decide intent kind, ruling category, boundaries, and test samples.
hardBoundaries: DeepSeek may not directly grant Gu, Immortal Gu, recipes, materials, currency, locations, battle results, NPC death, canon anchor changes, or endings.
UI may display a ruling and collect player confirmation, but UI may not calculate success, rewards, hidden facts, or faction membership.
World Intent Engine routes goals into existing local systems. It does not replace action protocol, combat, resource, refinement, story/canon, or store authority.
Hidden original facts are represented by refs only; visible explanations must not reveal unrevealed bodies.

Rank nine Gu, Spring Autumn Cicada, rank ten, true eternal life, Fate Gu ownership, mortal Treasure Yellow Heaven trading, and grotto-heaven ownership are blocked or downgraded unless a later local canon/story gate explicitly opens them.

allowedOutputs: visible explanation based on local ruling
